title: WIP: Adding a pass which splits inout wires (+ports).

features.name: module with multiple inout ports
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with multiple inout ports to trigger inout wire splitting logic
features.snippet: module top(input clk, inout LED4, inout LED5, inout LED6, inout LED7); wire x; endmodule

features.name: submodule with inout port used in multiple instantiations
features.description: Code should include a submodule with an inout port that is instantiated multiple times with the same port connected to different signals
features.snippet:
module other_io(inout IO); endmodule
module top(input a, input b); other_io o1(.IO(a)); other_io o2(.IO(b)); endmodule

features.name: array of module instances with inout port connections
features.description: Code should include an array of module instances where each instance has an inout port connected to a packed array of signals

features.name: parameterized module with inout port and attribute
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module with an inout port and a blackbox attribute to trigger port direction handling
features.snippet: (* blackbox *) module SB_IO #(parameter [5:0] PIN_TYPE=6'b0)(inout PIN, input PULLUP); endmodule
